Who I Am
About Me

I am a Data Science undergraduate at Newton School of Technology, Rishihood University, Haryana, with a passion for building machine learning systems and data-driven solutions. My work spans healthcare AI, financial analytics, and interdisciplinary research — always with a focus on measurable real-world impact. With a minor in Economics and Public Policy, I bring a multidisciplinary lens to every problem I approach.

SM
Saumya Mishra
Your Trusted
Analyst

Meet the Analyst

Saumya is a driven data science student with hands-on internship experience at IIT Hyderabad and Rishihood University. Her mission is to translate raw data into meaningful insights and build systems that matter — from clinical research pipelines to economic simulation dashboards.

Work Experience
Where I've
Applied It

Two professional research internships spanning clinical trials and social sciences, built upon a strong academic foundation in computer science and economics.

March — April 2025

Clinical Research Intern

IIT Hyderabad
  • Analysed clinical workflows to identify compliance gaps
  • Studied ethical frameworks in trial oversight
  • Applied data-driven analysis to clinical processes
June — July 2025

Research Intern

Rishihood University
  • Conducted research in literature and social sciences
  • Analysed survey-based data from the Kumbh field study
  • Data cleaning, structuring, and formatting across datasets
  • Contributed to interdisciplinary research design
Leadership — 2025

Vice President

Public Policy Club, Rishihood University
  • Organised events promoting youth civic engagement
  • Led research discussions on public policy topics
  • Drove collaborative interdisciplinary research initiatives
My Methodology
How I Work

A structured, research-backed approach from first principles to final delivery.

01

Define the Problem

Every engagement begins with a rigorous scoping exercise — understanding the stakeholder's real challenge, available data, constraints, and the metrics that define success. No assumptions, only first principles.

Discovery
02

Collect & Prepare Data

Source, clean, and structure data with rigorous validation. Handle missing values, outliers, and feature encoding. Ensure full reproducibility through documented pipelines and version-controlled scripts.

Data Engineering
03

Model & Experiment

Select appropriate algorithms — from classical ML to deep neural networks — based on problem structure. Run controlled experiments, validate rigorously with cross-validation and held-out test sets.

Machine Learning
04

Interpret & Communicate

Translate technical findings into clear, actionable narratives. Build visualisations, dashboards, and reports tailored to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Communication
05

Deploy & Iterate

Package solutions — whether Streamlit dashboards, REST APIs, or research papers — for real-world use. Monitor performance and iterate based on stakeholder feedback and new incoming data.

Delivery
Selected Work
Projects
01

Asymmetric Fraud Detection System

Cost-sensitive fraud detection with a custom asymmetric loss function penalising false negatives more heavily, improving risk-aware predictions in financial transaction analysis.

PythonMLFinance
View Project
02

Economic Shock Impact Analyzer

ML and Monte Carlo simulation system to analyse commodity shock impacts, with risk insights visualised through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.

StreamlitMonte CarloEconomics
View Project
03

SleepSense AI

1D-CNN pipeline in PyTorch for sleep apnea detection using multimodal physiological signals, with advanced preprocessing and Leave-One-Patient-Out cross-validation.

PyTorchHealthcare AI1D-CNN
View Project
04

Blinkit Analytics Centre

Analytics dashboards and KPIs using Excel and Looker Studio to drive customer insights, inventory optimisation, and feedback analysis for an e-commerce context.

ExcelLooker StudioAnalytics
View Project
05

Covid-19 India Impact Analysis

End-to-end data analysis pipeline across 43 Indian states using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib, with statistical modelling and over 10 original visualisations.

PandasNumPyMatplotlib
View Project
06

Video Caption Generator

Full-stack captioning system using React, Node.js, and Deepgram to automatically transcribe, transliterate, and render styled Hinglish captions with real-time preview.

ReactNode.jsDeepgram
View Project

Merits & Leadership
Impact, Recognition & Extra-Curricular Excellence

Viksit Bharat Young Leaders Dialogue 2025 — Finalist

Among the top 3,000 out of 30 lakh+ participants nationally. Contributed to development dialogues with policymakers and thought leaders.

Ignite 2025 — Startup Competition Finalist

Top 10 from 100 startup ideas. Selected for Founder's Bootcamp at BITS Goa.

National Exhibition on Science & Technology — III Place

Socio Category — IoT-based Smart Dustbin project demonstrating innovation in sustainable environmental solutions.

STEM Certifications

Completed certified courses in Scratch programming, 3D Designing, and Robotics.

Best MOC Award — NCC

Awarded Best MOC at the Combined Annual Training Camp in the National Cadet Corps.

Achievement Award for Academic Excellence

Class Topper in 2018 and 2019; School Topper in 2020. Recognised for consistent academic performance across consecutive years.

Inter-School TSSC — Science Expo Robotics

Participated in the inter-school TSSC Science Expo in the Robotics category.

School Leadership Roles

Head Girl in the final year; Vice Captain for two consecutive years; Prefect — demonstrating sustained leadership, responsibility, and service to the school community.

Credentials
Certifications
GUVI

Generative AI Certification

Completed hands-on training covering Large Language Models, Transformer architectures, and advanced NLP techniques including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Practical experience in fine-tuning generative models for real-world AI-driven content creation applications.

Dexterity School

Leadership & Entrepreneurship

The Dexterity 10 programme — four key skills (critical thinking, research, communication, and leadership), two core values (empathy and fearlessness), and two core commitments (public service and nation-building).
